title: Finding a Maximally Specific Hypothesis (S) in Find-S Algorithm
description: A flowchart illustrating the step-by-step process of the Find-S algorithm for finding the most specific hypothesis consistent with positive training examples.
elements: Generalize S for each attribute value mismatch
relationships: Process starts by initializing S, then iterates over each positive example, generalizing S only when attribute values mismatch, until a final consistent hypothesis is reached
